name: zeroheight-audit-docs
description: Audit a zeroheight design system's documentation for machine-readability against the Design System Documentation Spec (DSDS 0.12.0). Reads your live styleguide through your own zeroheight MCP connection and returns a prioritised, page-by-page list of authoring moves plus ready-to-paste segments.

zeroheightMcpUrl.title: zeroheight remote MCP URL
zeroheightMcpUrl.description: Your personal zeroheight remote MCP URL. Get it from zeroheight.com/settings/user/mcp (or a styleguide's Remote MCP details block). It is unique to you and carries your own credential.
